news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% in a Week
news.summary_zh: 据DeFiLlama数据，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主因新晋DEX交易量增长。
news.summary_en: Solana’s total DeFi TVL rose 12% this week, driven by increased trading volume on new DEXs, per DeFiLlama.

news.title_en: Cardano Unveils Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4技术路线图，预计2026年Q3上线主网，将增强智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 technical roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026. The upgrade promises stronger smart contract expressiveness and lower transaction fees.

news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism。
news.summary_en: Chainlink’s cross-chain interoperability protocol CCIP now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币拟引入ZK-Rollup二层方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Proposes ZK-Rollup Layer2 Scaling Solution
news.summary_zh: 狗狗币核心开发者提议基于ZK-Rollup的Layer2扩容方案，旨在降低小额转账手续费，草案已由基金会研究小组发布。
news.summary_en: Dogecoin core developers propose a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution to reduce microtransaction fees, with a draft released by the foundation’s research group.
